findings_p2.issue: Playbook verifies existence + discovery-surface grep but has no fill-quality smoke check against the filled example.
findings_p2.suggestion: Add a third TEST EXECUTION block that opens the 026/012 example and spot-checks header, Summary block, and at least one category table.

findings_p2.issue: Repo-root-relative paths, one-path-per-row, and glob usage rules live only in the bottom <!-- INSTRUCTIONS FOR AUTHORS --> comment; first-time fillers may miss them.
findings_p2.suggestion: Add a one-line 'fill rules' pointer under the Summary block, or duplicate the 3 key rules above the first category table.

findings_p2.issue: Classification wiring via SPEC_DOCUMENT_FILENAMES is correct but silent: operator sees no log line confirming resource-map.md was indexed, and /spec_kit:resume does not surface the map in its continuity ladder.
findings_p2.suggestion: Emit a one-line classification summary in generate-context.js post-save output, and consider surfacing resource-map.md presence in the resume surface when it exists.

strengths: 270-resource-map-template.md mirrors 267-tool-routing-enforcement.md structure (5 sections with TEST EXECUTION blocks).
Playbook commands are executable today; verified every target surface contains at least one resource-map.md hit and spec-doc-paths.ts line 15 includes it.

Cold-start operator journey (README -> templates/resource-map.md -> copy -> fill -> /memory:save) lands without friction; signposts exist in CLAUDE.md, SKILL.md, templates/README.md, and every level README.
Filled example at 026/012/resource-map.md serves as a working reference impl (32 entries across 7 categories; empty categories correctly omitted).

convergence_signal.delta_from_prior: new dimension; cumulative 0 P0 / 0 P1 / ~15 P2 across all 7 iterations

final_verdict.rationale: Seven iterations converge at 0 P0 and 0 P1. All accumulated findings are P2 polish/observability items that do not block merge. The two new category-22 entries faithfully mirror their neighbors, playbook commands execute against current reality, and the operator cold-start journey is signposted across all required discovery surfaces.
final_verdict.follow_up_tracker: Optional: open a follow-up ticket bundling P2-07-A/B/C plus the ~12 prior P2s for discretionary polish.
